hook.text: Every new team waited two weeks for the platform team to set up their pipeline. Self-service fixed that.

buildup.text: Self-service pipelines let teams create and configure their own CI/CD from templates. No tickets needed.

discovery.text: Golden templates enforce best practices. Teams pick a template and customize only what they need.

twist.text: Freedom with guardrails. Teams own their pipeline but inherit security scans and approval gates.

climax.text: Backstage and similar portals provide a catalog of templates. One click to scaffold a full pipeline.

punchline.text: Let teams own their pipelines. Templates keep standards.

quiz.question: What is the main benefit of self-service pipelines?
options: Teams can create pipelines quickly without waiting for a platform team
Pipelines run faster when teams manage them
Self-service pipelines eliminate the need for any security scanning
